meta.source: POST https://hyundailncusa.com/ajax/index.php?action=color_search (filters[brand][]=hanstone-quartz) + GET /colors/{slug}; primary slab photo is the PDP image above the “Full Slab” label (with fallbacks), plus grid + other PDP uploads for gallery (similar-colors excluded)
meta.note:
Unofficial AJAX usage; Hyundai LNC may change PHP actions or HTML without notice. PDP `

` drives size/finish. `imageUrl` prefers the PDP “Full Slab” slab photo (`extractFullSlabImageUrl`); `galleryImages` lists remaining unique assets from grid + PDP. Run with `--downloadImages=1` (default) to save files under `public/vendor-assets/hanstone-quartz//` and point JSON at `/vendor-assets/...`.
